title: Taze Configuration
description: Configuration for taze. Used by .tazerc, .tazerc.json, and taze.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete and validation.

cwd.description: Working directory used to resolve packages.

recursive.description: Recursively search for package.json in subdirectories.

ignorePaths.description: Glob patterns to ignore when searching for package.json files.

ignoreOtherWorkspaces.description: Ignore package.json files in other workspaces (those with their own .git, pnpm-workspace.yaml, etc.).

include.description: Only the included dependencies will be checked for updates. Accepts a single pattern or a list.

exclude.description: Dependencies to exclude from the check. Overrides `include`.

failOnOutdated.description: Exit with code 1 if outdated dependencies are found.

silent.description: Disable all output. Equivalent to setting `loglevel` to `"silent"`.

force.description: Force fetching from the registry, bypassing the cache.

peer.description: Include peerDependencies in the update process.

depFields.description: Fields in package.json to be checked. By default all fields are checked.

packageMode.description: Override bumping mode for specific dependencies. Keys are package names; values are the mode to use (or `"ignore"` to skip).

update.description: Run the package manager's update command after bumping.

all.description: Show all packages, including those that are up to date.

sort.description: Sort order for dependencies in the output.

group.description: Group dependencies by source (dependencies, devDependencies, etc.) on display.

timediff.description: Show time difference between the current and the updated version.

nodecompat.description: Show package compatibility with the current Node.js version.

maturityPeriod.description: Wait period in days before upgrading to newly released packages. Helps avoid potentially malicious packages released recently.

concurrency.description: Number of concurrent requests when resolving dependencies.
